_comment: Example workspace (settings-only). workspace_root resolves relative to the jumpcode's parent dir — point it at your project repo. Only the orchestrator launches by default — there are no pre-generated leads. 'enabled_roles' opts in the recommended central leads you want (omit/[] = orchestrator only); overlay charters under <workspace_root>/.jumpcode/roles/ launch automatically. role_runtimes overrides a launched role's runtime, e.g. {"backend-lead": "codex"}.
